goal: Propagate the CUDA base image resolver candidate and resolver output paths from the real-adapter CUDA training handoff into the downstream Docker image handoff generation command. This keeps operator-provided CUDA/Python base image choices consistent through the training-to-export sequence. The gate must not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO; release readiness remains NOT_GO until a real trained adapter and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exist.
head: b0f83e5
blocked_scope: Changing resolver or preflight acceptance policy
Pulling Docker images or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates, Dockerfiles, specs, or release acceptance policy
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA training handoff generator so its downstream Docker handoff generation command receives the same CUDA base image candidate list and resolver output paths, update focused tests, regenerate training handoff artifacts, rerun readiness, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --llamafactory-cli ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
required_evidence: Generated CUDA training handoff's prepare_docker_image command passes the same --cuda-base-image-candidate values used by the training resolver
Generated prepare_docker_image command passes --cuda-base-image-json-output and --cuda-base-image-env-output so downstream Docker handoff uses the same resolver artifacts
Focused tests cover the propagated flags and current generated artifact records them
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --llamafactory-cli ./.venv/bin/llamafactory-cli --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not pull Docker images, run CUDA training, or create model weights/adapters.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped propagation gate for CUDA base image candidate and resolver output settings from training handoff to Docker handoff generation.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed the generated prepare_docker_image command needed explicit propagation of CUDA base image candidates and resolver output paths.
phase_notes.build: Updated scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py to append --cuda-base-image-json-output, --cuda-base-image-env-output, and each --cuda-base-image-candidate to the downstream Docker handoff generation command; added focused shell assertions.
phase_notes.check: Regenerated artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.*, verified JSON and shell syntax, confirmed propagated flags with rg, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran M1 smoke bootstrap in .venv.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: CUDA training handoff downstream candidate propagation, focused tests, regenerated training handoff artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no Docker pulls, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
